name: Cash Loans Bear
description_short: Cash Loans Bear offers payday loans (up to $255) and installment loans (up to $5,000) with same-day funding at 45 locations nationwide, including Saugus, CA.
description_long:
Cash Loans Bear is a multi-location lending company operating 45 branches nationwide, with a physical office in Saugus, CA (Santa Clarita area) at 28100 Bouquet Canyon Road, Suite 209. The company positions itself as a quick-access lender for consumers facing unexpected financial emergencies such as job loss, illness, or sudden expenses. They operate seven days a week (8 am–10 pm) and emphasize a streamlined application process completed in approximately 15 minutes, either online or in-store.

The company offers two primary loan products: payday loans up to $255 with terms up to 31 days, and installment loans up to $5,000 with repayment terms of 2–48 months. Both products come with high APRs—payday loans carry APRs of approximately 372–460%, while installment loans carry APRs up to 200%. Payday loans charge $17.65 per $100 borrowed, and funds are typically disbursed via ACH transfer on the day of approval. The company advertises minimal documentation requirements and no co-signer needed for qualification.

Cash Loans Bear distinguishes itself through convenient physical locations, extended operating hours (open every day), and fast approval decisions. Their website includes customer testimonials highlighting ease of application, polite staff, transparent terms, and approval despite poor credit history. The branch manager is Eden Dodson, and contact information is publicly available via phone and email. All loan terms are framed as compliant with California state lending laws.

However, prospective borrowers should note that APR rates are exceptionally high, particularly for payday loans (372–460% APR), placing these products among the most expensive forms of consumer credit available. Installment loans, while offering longer terms, still carry APRs up to 200%. These are high-cost short-term credit products designed for emergency cash access, not debt consolidation or credit building. The company does not appear to offer credit counseling, financial education, or alternatives to borrowing.
address: 28100 Bouquet Canyon Rd suite 209, Saugus, CA 91350

company_info.headquarters: 28100 Bouquet Canyon Rd suite 209, Saugus, CA 91350

pros: Same-day funding available upon approval with quick 15-minute application process
No co-signer required; installment loans up to $5,000 available even with poor credit history
Extended hours (8 am–10 pm, seven days a week) and 45 nationwide locations for convenience
Multiple application methods: online or in-person at physical store location
Clear, transparent loan terms with specific APR and finance charge disclosures on website
Installment loans offer flexible 2–48 month repayment terms for larger amounts
Physical office with named branch manager (Eden Dodson) and direct contact information
cons: Payday loans carry extremely high APRs (372–460%), among the most expensive consumer credit available
Installment loans cap at APR 200%, still very costly compared to personal loans or credit union alternatives
Payday loan maximum only $255, insufficient for most genuine emergencies; must use installment loan for larger amounts
No mention of credit counseling, financial hardship options, or debt management resources
High finance charges: payday loan of $200 costs $30.68 in finance charges over 14 days
best_for: Consumers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (within 1–2 weeks) with no alternative access to credit
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Workers needing a small cash advance before their next paycheck with reliable income
diagnosis: Cash Loans Bear is best for consumers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who have exhausted other options and have reliable income to repay within weeks or months. The primary caveat is that these are high-cost credit products (APRs 372–460% for payday loans, up to 200% for installment loans) designed only as emergency stop-gaps, not solutions for longer-term financial difficulties; borrowers should explore payday-alternative lenders, credit counseling, or employer advances before using these products.
services: Payday loans up to $255 with terms up to 31 days
Installment loans up to $5,000 with 2–48 month repayment terms
In-store loan application and approval at 45 physical locations
Same-day funding via ACH transfer upon approval
Extended operating hours (8 am–10 pm, seven days a week)
Branch manager consultation and guidance through loan process
Loan applications for borrowers with poor credit history
Transparent disclosure of APR, finance charges, and repayment terms
